mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.question, p.answer AS correct_answer, p.explanation, s.name AS category, p.type, p.difficulty, p.option1, p.option2, p.option3, p.option4, p.option5, p.is_ai_generated, NULL AS programming_language FROM problem p INNER JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT #{limit}

choose.when: SELECT id, question, answer AS correct_answer, explanation, prog_language AS category, 'PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGE' AS type, difficulty, NULL AS option1, NULL AS option2, NULL AS option3, NULL AS option4, NULL AS option5, is_ai_generated, prog_language AS programming_language FROM programming_language_problems ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT #{limit}
choose.otherwise: SELECT p.id, p.question, p.answer AS correct_answer, p.explanation, s.name AS category, p.type, p.difficulty, p.option1, p.option2, p.option3, p.option4, p.option5, p.is_ai_generated, NULL AS programming_language FROM problem p INNER JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id WHERE p.type = #{type} ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT #{limit}

choose.when: SELECT s.name AS category, p.id AS id, p.question AS question, p.answer AS correct_answer, p.explanation, p.difficulty, p.is_ai_generated, p.option1, p.option2, p.option3, p.option4, p.option5, 'OBJECTIVE' AS type FROM subject s INNER JOIN problem p ON s.id = p.subject_id WHERE p.type = 'OBJECTIVE' ORDER BY RANDOM()
choose.otherwise: SELECT p.id, p.question, p.answer AS correct_answer, p.explanation, s.name AS category, p.type, p.difficulty, p.option1, p.option2, p.option3, p.option4, p.option5, p.is_ai_generated, NULL AS programming_language FROM problem p INNER JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id WHERE p.type = 'OBJECTIVE'

mapper.select: SELECT UPPER(TRIM(p.answer)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{p_submitted_answer})) AS is_correct, p.explanation, p.answer AS correct_answer FROM problem p WHERE p.id = #{p_problem_id} AND p.type = 'OBJECTIVE' UNION ALL SELECT UPPER(TRIM(plp.answer)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{p_submitted_answer})) AS is_correct, plp.explanation, plp.answer AS correct_answer FROM programming_language_problems plp WHERE plp.id = #{p_problem_id} LIMIT 1

choose.when: SELECT id FROM programming_language_problems WHERE LOWER(prog_language) = LOWER(#{category}) ORDER BY id ASC
choose.otherwise: SELECT p.id FROM problem p INNER JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id WHERE TRIM(s.name) = TRIM(#{category}) ORDER BY p.id ASC

choose.when: SELECT id FROM programming_language_problems WHERE difficulty = #{difficulty} AND LOWER(prog_language) = LOWER(#{category}) ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
choose.otherwise: SELECT p.id FROM problem p INNER JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id WHERE p.difficulty = #{difficulty} AND TRIM(s.name) = TRIM(#{category}) ORDER BY p.id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

choose.when: SELECT id FROM programming_language_problems ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT #{limit}

mapper.select:
SELECT cat AS subject_name FROM ( SELECT TRIM(s.name) AS cat FROM problem p INNER JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id UNION ALL SELECT prog_language AS cat FROM programming_language_problems ) t
cat IS NOT NULL AND cat != ''
AND cat NOT IN
#{category}
GROUP BY cat ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT 1

choose.when: SELECT id FROM programming_language_problems WHERE LOWER(prog_language) = LOWER(#{category}) ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT #{limit}
choose.otherwise: SELECT p.id FROM problem p INNER JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id WHERE TRIM(s.name) = TRIM(#{category}) ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT #{limit}

choose.when: SELECT * FROM programming_language_problems WHERE difficulty = #{difficulty} AND LOWER(prog_language) = LOWER(#{category}) LIMIT #{limit}
choose.otherwise: SELECT p.*, s.name AS category FROM problem p INNER JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id WHERE p.difficulty = #{difficulty} AND TRIM(s.name) = TRIM(#{category}) LIMIT #{limit}

mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM problem) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM programming_language_problems) AS total_count
SELECT s.id AS subject_id, s.name AS subject_name, COUNT(p.id) AS problem_count FROM subject s LEFT JOIN problem p ON s.id = p.subject_id AND p.type = 'OBJECTIVE' GROUP BY s.id, s.name ORDER BY s.id
SELECT id, name FROM subject ORDER BY id
